tools.name: gmail_archive
tools.description: Archive Gmail messages (remove from inbox). Accepts a single message_id, an array of message_ids, scan_id + sender_ids from a prior scan, or a query to archive all matches. Include a confidence score (0-1).

message_ids.description: Gmail message IDs to archive (for batch operations)

scan_id.description: Scan result ID from a prior gmail_sender_digest or gmail_outreach_scan call

sender_ids.description: Sender IDs to archive (used with scan_id)

query.description: Gmail search query to archive all matching messages

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

account.description: Email address of the Gmail account to use. Required when multiple Gmail accounts are connected. If omitted, uses the most recently connected account.

tools.name: gmail_label
tools.description: Add or remove labels on one or more Gmail messages. Accepts a single message_id or an array of message_ids. Include a confidence score (0-1).

message_ids.description: Gmail message IDs for batch label operations

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

account.description: Email address of the Gmail account to use. Required when multiple Gmail accounts are connected. If omitted, uses the most recently connected account.

tools.name: gmail_trash
tools.description: Move a Gmail message to trash. Include a confidence score (0-1).

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

account.description: Email address of the Gmail account to use. Required when multiple Gmail accounts are connected. If omitted, uses the most recently connected account.

tools.name: gmail_unsubscribe
tools.description: Unsubscribe from a mailing list by following the List-Unsubscribe header. Include a confidence score (0-1).

message_id.description: A Gmail message ID from the mailing list to unsubscribe from

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

account.description: Email address of the Gmail account to use. Required when multiple Gmail accounts are connected. If omitted, uses the most recently connected account.

tools.name: gmail_draft
tools.description: Create a draft email in Gmail. The draft will appear in Gmail Drafts for user review.

in_reply_to.description: RFC 822 Message-ID header (e.g. `<CABx...@mail.gmail.com>`) or a Gmail message ID. If a Gmail message ID is provided (no angle brackets), the RFC 822 Message-ID is resolved automatically.

thread_id.description: Gmail thread ID. Places the draft in the specified thread so it appears as a reply in Gmail's conversation view.

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

account.description: Email address of the Gmail account to use. Required when multiple Gmail accounts are connected. If omitted, uses the most recently connected account.

tools.name: gmail_send_draft
tools.description: Send an existing Gmail draft. Only use when the user has reviewed and explicitly approved sending.

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

account.description: Email address of the Gmail account to use. Required when multiple Gmail accounts are connected. If omitted, uses the most recently connected account.

tools.name: gmail_attachments
tools.description: List or download Gmail attachments. Use action 'list' to enumerate attachments on a message, then 'download' to save a specific attachment to disk.

action.description: List attachments on a message, or download a specific attachment

attachment_id.description: Attachment ID (required for download, from a prior list call)

filename.description: Filename to save as (required for download)

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

account.description: Email address of the Gmail account to use. Required when multiple Gmail accounts are connected. If omitted, uses the most recently connected account.

tools.name: gmail_forward
tools.description: Create a draft forwarding a Gmail message to another recipient, preserving attachments. Include a confidence score (0-1).

text.description: Optional text to prepend to the forwarded message

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

account.description: Email address of the Gmail account to use. Required when multiple Gmail accounts are connected. If omitted, uses the most recently connected account.

tools.name: gmail_follow_up
tools.description: Track, list, or untrack Gmail messages for follow-up using a dedicated label. Include a confidence score (0-1).

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

account.description: Email address of the Gmail account to use. Required when multiple Gmail accounts are connected. If omitted, uses the most recently connected account.

tools.name: gmail_filters
tools.description: List, create, or delete Gmail filters for inbox automation. Include a confidence score (0-1).

add_label_ids.description: Filter action: label IDs to add (for create)

remove_label_ids.description: Filter action: label IDs to remove (for create)

forward.description: Filter action: forward to email (for create)

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

account.description: Email address of the Gmail account to use. Required when multiple Gmail accounts are connected. If omitted, uses the most recently connected account.

tools.name: gmail_vacation
tools.description: Get, enable, or disable Gmail vacation auto-responder. Include a confidence score (0-1).

restrict_to_domain.description: Only auto-reply to same domain (default false)

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

account.description: Email address of the Gmail account to use. Required when multiple Gmail accounts are connected. If omitted, uses the most recently connected account.

tools.name: gmail_sender_digest
tools.description: Scan Gmail and group messages by sender to identify high-volume senders (e.g. newsletters). Returns top senders sorted by message count with metadata for bulk cleanup.

page_token.description: Resume token from a previous scan (rarely needed - scans now cover up to 2,000 messages in a single call)

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

account.description: Email address of the Gmail account to use. Required when multiple Gmail accounts are connected. If omitted, uses the most recently connected account.

tools.name: gmail_outreach_scan
tools.description: Scan Gmail inbox for senders without List-Unsubscribe headers (potential cold outreach). Returns top senders with message counts and sample subjects. Read-only - use gmail_archive and gmail_filters for cleanup.

page_token.description: Resume token from a previous scan (rarely needed - scans now cover up to 2,000 messages in a single call)

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

account.description: Email address of the Gmail account to use. Required when multiple Gmail accounts are connected. If omitted, uses the most recently connected account.

tools.name: gmail_preferences
tools.description: Manage Gmail cleanup preferences (blocklist and safelist). The blocklist contains senders to auto-archive in future cleanups. The safelist contains senders the user wants to keep (excluded from cleanup tables).

action.description: Preference action: list all preferences, or add/remove emails from blocklist or safelist

emails.description: Email addresses to add or remove (required for add/remove actions)

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called
